articles.title: This LLM in a box is powered by a hand crank.
articles.description:
As spotted earlier by The Register, CrankGPT is a concept project from a two-person team at Squeez Labs that runs private, local AI models without needing a power-hungry data center. Instead, you have to literally crank out your own power for each of the chatbot’s answers.
[Media: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HSapdLYpmWY]
articles.content:

articles.title: Maharashtra Signs Pact With Google To Train Over 4 Lakh Teachers In AI And Digital Skills Free Of Cost
articles.description: In Mumbai, the Maharashtra School Education Department has signed a Letter of Intent with Google for Education to train over four lakh teachers in Artificial Intelligence and digital skills through the ‘Google AI Educator Series’. The 18-month programme aims to enhance AI literacy and modern teaching methods across government and aided schools without financial burden on the state.
articles.content: Mumbai: In a major step towards integrating emerging technologies into the education sector, the Maharashtra School Education Department on Friday signed a Letter of Intent (LoI) with Google for Education to provide advanced training in Artificial In... [3355 chars]

articles.title: winning AI researcher John Jumper leaves Google DeepMind for Anthropic
articles.description: The battle for elite AI talent just claimed another major name. John Jumper, the Nobel Prize-winning researcher behind AlphaFold, announced Friday that he is leaving Google DeepMind after nearly nine years to join AI startup Anthropic.
